## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Standards text
- [ ] Solidity interface or implementation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Process/submission material

## Checklist

- [ ] `forge test` passes
- [ ] `forge fmt --check` passes
- [ ] Interface IDs updated if ABI changed
- [ ] ERC draft updated if normative behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, private keys, or populated env files included
